status: created in Penpot on 2026-05-26; ready for visual review
targetPageName: 01 Shell, Login, Logout, and Project Cockpit

frames.name: SHELL-01 Login
frames.acceptance: No module navigation or project action appears before authentication.

frames.name: SHELL-02 Login invalid credentials
frames.purpose: Show a failed sign-in with clear recovery.
frames.acceptance: Error copy is clear, non-leaky, and focus returns to the actionable area.

frames.name: SHELL-03 Logout confirmed
frames.purpose: Confirm session end and remove authenticated actions.
frames.acceptance: The screen cannot be mistaken for an authenticated route.

frames.name: SHELL-04 Signed-out recovery
frames.purpose: Recover when a protected route is opened after session expiry.
frames.acceptance: The user understands why they were stopped and how to resume.

frames.name: SHELL-05 No active project
frames.purpose: Show authenticated shell while project context is missing.
frames.acceptance: No operational module appears ready when project context is missing.

frames.name: SHELL-06 Context setup
frames.purpose: Select or repair project, profile, environment, and scope.
frames.acceptance: The user can see which context fields gate module access.

frames.name: SHELL-07 Project Cockpit ready
frames.acceptance: The first viewport makes context, readiness, blocker count, and next action obvious.

frames.name: SHELL-08 Readiness blocked
frames.purpose: Explain why the project is not ready.
frames.acceptance: The user can identify the blocking condition before entering modules.

frames.name: SHELL-09 Workstreams
frames.purpose: Show module/workstream progress without becoming the module.
frames.acceptance: Each workstream has a destination or a visible reason it is blocked.

frames.name: SHELL-10 Blockers
frames.purpose: Make cross-module blockers inspectable and actionable.
frames.acceptance: Critical blockers have clear ownership and next action.

frames.name: SHELL-11 Activity timeline
frames.purpose: Show recent project events without replacing Evidence Hub.
frames.acceptance: Timeline entries link to owning routes where detail belongs.

frames.name: SHELL-12 Jobs summary failed
frames.purpose: Summarize job health and route failed jobs to Admin Console / Jobs.
frames.acceptance: The Cockpit identifies the failed job but does not duplicate Admin job detail.

frames.name: SHELL-13 Artifacts and evidence permissions
frames.purpose: Summarize artifacts/evidence and show permission-aware unavailable states.
frames.acceptance: Permission limits are visible and do not look like missing data.

frames.name: SHELL-14 Global action destination review
frames.purpose: Expose backend-owned global actions and their destinations before cleanup.
frames.acceptance: Every global action has destination, prerequisite, and enabled or disabled state.

moduleAcceptanceChecklist: Login and logout/session-ended states are represented.
Authenticated navigation is absent after logout or invalid session.
Active context is visible in every authenticated frame.
Blocked and missing-context states explain prerequisites.
Module shortcuts are backend-owned and permission aware.
Cockpit summaries do not duplicate module detail screens.
Empty, failed, blocked, and permission-unavailable states are visible.
Return paths are present on child routes.
